message: Command `find / -type f -name "*.tar.gz" 2>/dev/null | xargs -I {} sh -c 'tar -tzf "{}" 2>/dev/null | grep -i "oss\|fuzz" && echo "=== {} ==="' 2>/dev/null | head -50` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments: {"command": "find / -type f -name \"*.tar.gz\" 2>/dev/null | xargs -I {} sh -c 'tar -tzf \"{}\" 2>/dev/null | grep -i \"oss\\|fuzz\" && echo \"=== {} ===\"' 2>/dev/null | head -50"}
function.name: execute_bash
